title: panicum panis
intro: Panicum panis, also known as Panic grass or Wild rice, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Panicum panis include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to improve digestion, reduce symptoms of diabetes, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Panicum panis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
